properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

drillAssetProperties.description: Properties for internal resources that are created for the Drill.

executionState.description: Execution state of the Drill. Whether it is currently running or not.

attentionReason.description: Attention reason if the ReadinessState is 'NeedsAttention'.

systemMetadata.description: Internal System Metadata, to be used by internal components only.

lastResyncReadinessCheckTime.description: Last resync and readiness check time.

errorDetails.description: Error details associated with the resource.

identity.description: Identity to use for metrics operations.

metricsToTrack.description: Metrics associated with this Drill. These will be tracked through the Drill Run.

type.description: Identity type linked with the resource

userAssignedIdentity.description: User assigned identity id linked with the resource

destinationAmwAccountUrl.description: Destination AMW account where the time-series data of the metric lives.

identity.description: Identity to use for Health Model operations.

healthModelId.description: Full ARM Id of the Health Model.

identity.description: Identity to use for RecoveryPlan operations.

recoveryPlanId.description: Recovery Orchestration plan associated with this Drill.

subscription.description: Subscription where Drill's internal resources will be created.

region.description: Region where Drill's internal resources will be created.

resourceGroup.description: Resource group where Drill's internal resources will be created. If not specified, defaults to 'AzureResilienceManagementDrills'. This value is immutable after drill creation.

identity.description: Identity to use for Chaos Resource operations.

chaosResourceIdentityForFaults.description: Identity to be used by the Chaos Resource for invoking faults on resources.

chaosResourceId.description: Chaos Resource created for this Drill

identity.description: Identity to use for Chaos Experiment operations.

chaosExperimentIdentityForFaults.description: Identity to be used by the Chaos Experiment for invoking faults on resources.

chaosExperimentId.description: Chaos Experiment resource created for this Drill

drillRbacOnExperiment.description: Drill object does not have the necessary RBAC to run the chaos experiment.

rbacNeededForDrillOnExperiment.description: Permissions needed by the Drill MSI to run the chaos experiment.

drillRbacOnChaosResource.description: Drill object does not have the necessary RBAC to run the chaos resource.

rbacNeededForDrillOnChaosResource.description: Permissions needed by the Drill MSI to run the chaos resource.

drillRbacOnRecoveryPlan.description: Drill object does not have the necessary RBAC to run the Recovery Plan.

rbacNeededForDrillOnRecoveryPlan.description: Permissions needed by the Drill MSI to run the Recovery Plan.

drillRbacOnAzureMonitoringWorkspace.description: Drill object does not have the necessary RBAC to read the Azure Monitoring Workspace account.

rbacNeededForDrillOnAzureMonitoringWorks.description: Permissions needed by the Drill MSI to read Azure Monitoring Workspace account.

drillRbacOnSlo.description: Drill object does not have the necessary RBAC to read the SLO object.

rbacNeededForDrillOnSlo.description: Permissions needed by the Drill MSI to read SLO object.

drillRbacOnAzureHealthModel.description: Drill object does not have the necessary RBAC to read the Azure Health Model.

rbacNeededForDrillOnAzureHealthModel.description: Permissions needed by the Drill MSI to read Azure Health Model.

faultRbacOnTargets.description: RBAC required by Experiment MSI not setup on the target resources.

rbacOnTargetResources.description: RBAC required by Chaos Resource MSI not setup on the target resources.

runbookFaultRbacOnTargets.description: RBAC required by AutomationAccount for runbook MSI not setup on the target resources.

targets.description: One or more Target or Capability object is deleted.

chaosResource.description: Chaos resource for faulting exists or not.

chaosResourceCreationFailureReasons.description: Reason for Chaos Resource Creation failure

recoveryPlanAndDrillResourcesState.description: Resources associated in Recovery Plan and Drill are out of sync.

serviceGroupAndDrillResourcesState.description: Resources in Service Group and Drill are out of sync.

drillUserMsi.description: User MSI associated with Drill object is deleted.

chaosExperimentUserMsi.description: User MSI associated with chaos experiment object is deleted.

chaosResourceUserMsi.description: User MSI associated with chaos resource object is deleted.

drillRbacOnMonitoringResources.description: Drill MSI does not have the necessary RBAC to read the Drill Monitoring resources.

drillMonitoringErrors.description: Errors related to Drill Monitoring resources.

monitoringRbacOnDrillResources.description: Monitoring RBAC required by Drill MSI not setup on the target resources.

rbacNeededForDrillOnDrillMonitoringResou.description: Permissions needed by the Drill MSI to Upload service group health data for monitoring.

rbacNeededForDrillOnDrillResources.description: Permissions needed by the Drill MSI to read health metrics data for resources in service group.

missingRequiredResourceProviders.description: List of required required Azure resource providers that are not registered in the subscription specified for chaos resource.

recommendations.description: A list of recommendations to resolve the error.

initialConfig.description: Indicates if the Initial system configuration of the Drill is complete or not.

resourceTypeCategories.description: An indication whether a intrested resource type is present in drill resource.

lastRunState.description: Status of the last run of this Drill.

lastRunDuration.description: Timespan of the last run of this Drill.

lastRunAttestation.description: Attestation state of the last run of this Drill.

id.description:
The fully qualified resource ID of the MoboBroker resource.
Example: `/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}`

identity.description: Identity to use for Drill monitoring operations.

vmsPresent.description: An indication whether a VM is included in this Zonal Drill. If not, RO is not needed.

principalId.description: The service principal ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

tenantId.description: The tenant ID of the system assigned identity. This property will only be provided for a system assigned identity.

type.description: Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

userAssignedIdentities.description: The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.

protectionSolutionType.description: A setting that indicates the resource protected with which recovery solution.

resourceId.description: The Azure resource ID hosting the custom action automation script.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.

goals.description: Computed and copied data of resilience goals.

recommendations.description: Computed and copied data of Azure recommendations.

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time of the unified resilience item.

templateId.description: Arm id of the goal template.

assignmentId.description: Arm id of the goal assignment.

regionalRecoveryPointObjectiveInMinutes.description: Regional RPO set in resilience goal in minutes.

regionalRecoveryPointEstimatedInMinutes.description: Computed recovery point estimated for the service group in minutes.

regionalRecoveryPointObjectiveStatus.description: Regional RPO status of the service group.

regionalRecoveryTimeObjectiveInMinutes.description: Regional RTO set in resilience goal in minutes.

regionalRecoveryTimeActualInMinutes.description: Computed RTA for the service group in minutes.

regionalRecoveryTimeObjectiveStatus.description: Regional RTO status of the service group.

requireHighAvailability.description: Whether the resource is required for high availability.

requireDisasterRecovery.description: Whether the resource is required for disaster recovery.

highAvailability.description: The high availability section of resilience recommendation.

enabledResourceCount.description: Count of resources that have high availability enabled.

notEnabledResourceCount.description: Count of resources that do not have high availability enabled.

notEvaluatedResourceCount.description: Count of resources that have not been evaluated for high availability.

evaluationDateTime.description: The date and time when the high availability recommendations were last evaluated.

resourceIds.description: Azure resource IDs to evaluate for resiliency. Pass an empty array to automatically discover and evaluate non-resilient resources in the service group. Maximum 50 resources per request.

resourceCapacities.description: Individual resiliency assessment for each evaluated resource.

recommendations.description: High-level recommendations that apply across multiple resources (e.g., regional migration patterns, common SKU upgrades).

agentError.description: Error message from the AI advisor, if the advisory enrichment failed. The deterministic assessment results are still available even when this field is set.

resourceId.description: Fully qualified ARM resource ID of the evaluated resource.

skuName.description: Current SKU or pricing tier of the resource (e.g., 'Standard_D4s_v3', 'Standard_LRS').

location.description: Azure region where the resource is deployed (e.g., 'eastus', 'westeurope').

capacityAssessment.description: Human-readable assessment of this resource's resiliency posture. Contains actionable recommendations when available, or null when the AI advisor is unavailable.

error.description: Error message if the resource could not be evaluated (e.g., resource not found or access denied). Other fields may be empty when this is set.

category.description: Resiliency eligibility classification for this resource. See ResiliencyEligibilityCategory for possible values.

suggestedRegions.description: Alternative Azure regions that support resiliency for this resource type. Populated when the current region does not support the required redundancy.

suggestedSkus.description: Alternative SKUs that support redundancy for this resource type in the current region. Populated when the current SKU is not eligible for resiliency.

steps.description: Ordered list of actions to enable or improve resiliency for this resource.

links.description: Links to relevant Azure documentation for configuring resiliency.

resourceCount.description: Total count of resources under the goal assignment after refresh.

lastRefreshTime.description: Time when the refresh operation was last performed.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

id.description: Fully qualified resource ID for the resource. E.g. "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}"

type.description: The type of the resource. E.g. "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines" or "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts"

systemData.description: Azure Resource Manager metadata containing createdBy and modifiedBy information.
